name: ~ The Low Poly RPG ~
description:
Welcome to The Low Poly RPG!

This bot is based around the DS and with its Low-Polyness.

To be clear, this bot is like an “Anything” bot, not characters pre-set, it’s just that everything is low-poly and everyone has crunchy, low quality voices to fill that retro vibe.

Now, to be clear, while this bot is mostly designed to be like an RPG, Turn-Based or not, you can just simply tell the bot with brackets, which are these if you don’t know -> “(“ that this rp is gonna be a... uh, platformer or you can just say you don’t want the stats.

Uh, that’s all I have to say, enjoy the bot, dude bros. I know it’s small, but I’m not in a bot-making mood right now.
creator: TrustworthyClaus
